strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role
concerns: Lacks 15 years at senior/principal scope; career trajectory is senior developer, not director-level IC
No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, published AI products, or advanced AI degree
No evidence of cloud platform strategy, advising strategic customers, or large-org influence

key_factors.factor: Missing AI/ML depth and recognized AI products
Seniority gap vs. Principal/Director-level IC expectations
Entrepreneurial founder experience with open-source platform

response.justification: The candidate is a capable senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some early AI-agent tooling exposure, but the role demands a Principal/Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy fluency, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers. The resume shows neither AI products at scale, an advanced AI degree, nor evidence of strategic influence at that altitude.
